Day Shift at the Heartbreak Café picks up where Night Shift at the Liar’s Club left off — but now the neon’s traded for sunshine, and the secrets sound a little sweeter in daylight.
These nine songs pour heartache, humor, and redemption into a single cup — served by a silver-haired beauty in her 20s with bangs, a handsome bearded cowboy in his 30s, and the regulars who keep coming back for one more refill.
It’s Americana with a grin: pedal steel and Stratocaster, country-soul harmonies, and rhythm and blues warmth under a golden-hour groove.
Every story comes with a wink and a heartbeat — because sometimes the only way to heal is to laugh before you cry.
Pull up a stool. The truth tastes better in the morning.","downloadable":false,"download_count":0,"duration":254546,"full_duration":254537,"embeddable_by":"all","genre":"Country, Alt-Country, Americana, Storytelling,
